M1511_HRT_FAILR_PHYSN_TRTMT M1511 Heart Fail. Follow-Up: Physician-Ordered Treatment This field indicates, if the patient has been diagnosed with heart failure and has exhibited symptoms indicative of heart failure since the previous OASIS assessment, physician-ordered patient-specific established parameters for treatment were implemented. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x
